name: tax-god-copilot
description: Tax God v3.1 - Multi-agent tax, legal & financial AI co-pilot

scripts.cleanup:ports:aggressive: sh -c 'for p in 8000 8001 5000 5050 5001 3000 8080 5173; do pid=$(lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -9 $pid && echo Killed port $p; done; pkill -9 -f uvicorn 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f vite 2>/dev/null; echo Done.'
